memberdef.name: PARTYNOTIF_PARTY_MEMBER_INVITED_TO_CUSTOM_GAME
memberdef.initializer: TEXT("Party Member Invited To Custom Game")

memberdef.name: PARTYNOTIF_CANCEL_MATCHMAKING_DUE_TO_KICK
memberdef.initializer: TEXT("Party Member Has Been Kicked Cancel Matchmaking For Kicked User")

memberdef.type: TPair< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser >, TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > >
memberdef.definition: using FInvitedPlayerPair = TPair<TSharedRef<const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser>, TSharedRef<const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser>>
memberdef.name: FInvitedPlayerPair

detaileddescription.para: TPair for an invited user, with the first element being the user that invited them, and the second element being the invited user

memberdef.type: TMap< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser >, TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyMemberAccelByte >, FDefaultSetAllocator, TUserUniqueIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs< TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyMemberAccelByte > > >

memberdef.name: FUserIdToPartyMemberMap

detaileddescription.para: Map of user IDs to party member instances

memberdef.type: TMap< TSharedRef< const FOnlinePartyIdAccelByte >, TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyAccelByte >, FDefaultSetAllocator, TPartyIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs< TSharedRef< FOnlinePartyAccelByte > > >
memberdef.definition: using FPartyIDToPartyMap = TMap<TSharedRef<const FOnlinePartyIdAccelByte>, TSharedRef<FOnlinePartyAccelByte>, FDefaultSetAllocator, TPartyIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs<TSharedRef<FOnlinePartyAccelByte>>>
memberdef.name: FPartyIDToPartyMap

detaileddescription.para: Typedef for a map of shared references to FOnlinePartyIdAccelByte objects to shared references to FOnlinePartyAccelByte objects

memberdef.type: TMap< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser >, FPartyIDToPartyMap, FDefaultSetAllocator, TUserUniqueIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs< FPartyIDToPartyMap > >
memberdef.definition: using FUserIDToPartiesMap = TMap<TSharedRef<const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser>, FPartyIDToPartyMap, FDefaultSetAllocator, TUserUniqueIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs<FPartyIDToPartyMap>>
memberdef.name: FUserIDToPartiesMap

detaileddescription.para: Typedef for a map of user IDs to maps of party IDs and party objects

memberdef.type: TMap< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser >, FPartyInviteArray, FDefaultSetAllocator, TUserUniqueIdConstSharedRefMapKeyFuncs< FPartyInviteArray > >

memberdef.name: FUserIdToPartyInvitesMap

detaileddescription.para: Map of user IDs to an array of invite structures
